sections.name: Ant Matutinum 3N
lines: Not on bread alone doth man live, but on every word that proceedeth from the mouth of God.;;269;270;271

sections.name: Responsory8
lines: R. Thou who knowst all hidden things, cleanse me from my sins;
* Grant to me time to cry in repentance: I have sinned, have mercy on me O God.
V. Turn away thy face from my sins, and blot out all my iniquities.
R. Grant to me time to cry in repentance: I have sinned, have mercy on me O God.
